dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4445 IS: Veterans Protection from Fraud Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Cortez Masto (for herself and Mr. Budd) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 18, United States Code, to enhance penalties for certain crimes committed against veterans, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Veterans Protection from Fraud Act of 2026.

section.header: Enhanced penalties for certain crimes against veterans
section.text: Section 2326(2) of title 18, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (A), by striking or at the end;
in subparagraph (B), by striking the comma and inserting ; or; and
by inserting after subparagraph (B) the following:

subparagraph.text: targeted veterans (as such term is defined in section 101 of title 38) of any age,
